ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admissions_data" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "pared" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the applicant's parents attended the university (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "public_school" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the applicant attended a public high school (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the applicant */,
  "admission_level" TEXT /* Level of likelihood for admission (e.g., unlikely, neutral, likely) */,
  "admission_probability" REAL /* Predicted probability of admission */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the final decision was made */,
  "decision_outcome" TEXT /* Final outcome of the admission decision (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the decision */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the applicant applied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_data_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_data_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_data_admission_level FOREIGN KEY ("admission_level") REFERENCES admission_levels ("level_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the applicant */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the applicant's high school */,
  "high_school_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the applicant graduated from high school */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the applicant */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the applicant (e.g., citizen, permanent resident, international student) */,
  "high_school_gpa" REAL /* GPA of the applicant from high school */,
  "test_scores" TEXT /* Test scores (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission level (e.g., unlikely, neutral, likely) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission level */,
  "min_probability" REAL /* Minimum probability threshold for the level */,
  "max_probability" REAL /* Maximum probability threshold for the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "admission_officer" TEXT /* Name of the primary admission officer for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of students the department can admit each year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission criterion */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the criterion applies to */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "min_gpa" REAL /* Minimum GPA required */,
  "max_gpa" REAL /* Maximum GPA allowed */,
  "min_pared" INTEGER /* Minimum value for pared (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "max_pared" INTEGER /* Maximum value for pared (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "min_public" INTEGER /* Minimum value for public school (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "max_public" INTEGER /* Maximum value for public school (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "min_probability" REAL /* Minimum probability of admission required */,
  "max_probability" REAL /* Maximum probability of admission allowed */,
  "min_test_score" INTEGER /* Minimum test score required (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  "max_test_score" INTEGER /* Maximum test score allowed (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age requirement */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age requirement */,
  "min_ethnicity" REAL /* Minimum percentage of a specific ethnicity required */,
  "max_ethnicity" REAL /* Maximum percentage of a specific ethnicity allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_criteria_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admissions officer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions_data ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., transcript, recommendation letter) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., uploaded, reviewed, accepted) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the document */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the document was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission decision */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the admission decision (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the decision */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the decision */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_decisions_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions_data ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_decisions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "recipient_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_notifications_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions_data ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_notifications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
